faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Sheepshead Bay range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are crickets common in Sheepshead Bay homes?
faqs.answer: Sheepshead Bay's coastal location creates moisture-rich environments that attract crickets. The area's older buildings often have cracks and gaps that allow crickets easy entry, while basements and ground-level units near vegetation provide ideal harborage areas for these pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Sheepshead Bay can be controlled within 1-2 treatments. You'll notice a significant reduction in cricket activity within 24-48 hours of the initial treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks depending on infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We'll provide specific instructions on any necessary precautions, though most treatments allow you to return to your home within a few hours of application.
